label: Ceasefires Currently in Force
contestNote: Lebanon 10-day ceasefire (Apr 16) expires Apr 26 — 2nd round direct talks in Washington Apr 23 seeking 1-month extension (first direct Lebanon-Israel diplomacy in ~3 decades); US-Iran ceasefire under strain: US seized Iranian tanker in Indian Ocean Apr 23, Iran seized 2 vessels Apr 22, Iran parliament warns Strait of Hormuz will remain closed while blockade continues; DRC-M23 COVM verification missions ongoing
deltaNote: vs Jan 2026 (Sudan, Gaza Phase II unresolved, Yemen spillover); Lebanon + Iran ceasefire extension partially offset by ongoing violations
